criteria.label: Route and deliverable fit
checks: Correct route selected
Primary deliverable matches user request
Template choice is justified

criteria.label: Brand and token consistency
checks: NERO design tokens applied or deliberate override stated
Brand tone is restrained, professional, and evidence-first
Palette is not a random one-hue look

criteria.label: Layout and typography
checks: Text does not overflow or collide
Chinese typography has adequate line-height
Grid, spacing, radius, and hierarchy are consistent

criteria.label: Information hierarchy
checks: Conclusion or key number appears early
Evidence blocks are scannable
Dense information remains readable

criteria.label: Data and evidence integrity
checks: Numbers include unit, period, denominator where relevant
Sources are visible or traceable
Placeholders and assumptions are clearly separated from verified facts

criteria.label: Chart quality
checks: Chart labels are readable at final size
Color palette supports comparison
Chart geometry does not distort data

criteria.label: Output QA
checks: Output dimensions or slide/video geometry are explicit
Generated file exists when applicable
Desktop/mobile/frame/slide checks are documented where relevant

criteria.label: gpt-image-2 boundary
checks: Generated imagery is visual素材 only
Exact text, numbers, charts, and source notes are overlaid by code
No generated text or figures are treated as evidence

ratings.pass: Ready or close to ready after normal final review.
ratings.review: Usable direction, but requires design or evidence cleanup.
ratings.fail: Do not deliver; fix core design or evidence issues first.
